user.title: Schedule Manager
user.description:
This integration adds:

• Hub — one device with the status sensor and the global enable switch.
• One device per schedule you create (e.g. Living room) — each has its own switch to enable or disable that schedule.

**New schedule:** Settings → Devices & services → Schedule Manager → entry menu (⋮) or the integration card → **Configure** → **Create schedule**.

On the next screen you can rename devices and assign rooms. "Ignore and finish" skips naming and completes setup.

Only one Schedule Manager integration can be added (no duplicates).

abort.already_configured: Schedule Manager is already configured. Remove the existing entry in Settings if you need to start over.

init.title: Schedule Manager
init.description: Create a schedule or open advanced settings.

add_schedule.title: New schedule
add_schedule.description: A device and a switch will be created for this schedule. Add time blocks from the Schedule Manager Lovelace card or with the schedule_manager.update_schedule service.

advanced.title: Advanced settings
advanced.description: Options for overrides and related behaviour.

error.empty_name: Enter a name for the schedule.

abort.storage_unavailable: Schedule Manager storage is not available. Restart Home Assistant or reload the integration.
